samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Divide a 16-bit number by an 8-bit number.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">Dividend.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">Divider.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">Quotient.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">Remainder.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Two always blocks are used for this module. One is a combinational block triggered by changes in inputs A and B, updating register a_reg and b_reg with their respective values. Another is a sequential block triggered by changes in inputs A and B, performing the division operation.</implementation>
</module>
samples.tb_log:

                                 : ... In instance div_16bit
   13 |         result = A / B;
      |                    ^
                ... Use "/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Warning-WIDTH: div_16bit.v:14:17: Operator MODDIV expects 16 bits on the RHS, but RHS's VARREF 'B' generates 8 bits.
                                 : ... In instance div_16bit
   14 |         odd = A % B;
      |                 ^
